  "findings": [
    "Voltage rated gloves are either of an incorrect class for the nominal voltage or are past their required 6-month retest date."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work requiring voltage-rated gloves.",
    "Verify the nominal voltage of the circuit to be worked on.",
    "Procure and inspect properly rated, currently certified Class 00 or Class 0 rubber insulating gloves with leather protectors."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using voltage-rated gloves that are of an incorrect class or are overdue for their periodic electrical testing violates safety standards and exposes the worker to immediate shock and electrocution hazards.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 70E Article 130.7(C)(7)",
    "OSHA 1910.137"
  ]
